steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says that residents always point to the Turkins as “the most accomplished and most enlightened family of all.”

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B captures that the Turkins hold a special, standout position in the city. The other three either misrepresent the Turkins as newcomers, as amused by others, or as disliking the city, none of which is supported by the signal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
